#  Delete a Submittal Package 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permission** :
    * 'Admin' level permission on the project's Submittals tool.
  * **Limitation** :
    * Deleting a submittal package permanently removes it.
    * Deleted package information is not stored in the Recycle Bin.
  * **Additional Information** :  
Once a submittal package is deleted:
    * If you want to delete an unpackaged submittal, see [Delete a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/delete-a-submittal).
    * They are labeled 'Unpackaged' in the Packages view.
    * Individual submittals appear in the List view.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Click **Packages**.
  3. Locate the package to delete and click **View**.
  4. Click the vertical ellipsis and select **Delete**.
  5. A confirmation window appears. Click **Delete** to confirm the delete action. 
     * _Note_ : Any submittals contained in the deleted package are now listed in the Submittals log as 'Unpackaged.' If you want to delete one or more of these submittals, see [Delete a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/delete-a-submittal).


## See Also
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Builder](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-builder)
  * [Enable Submittal Schedule Calculations](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/enable-submittal-schedule-calculations)
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Packages - Distribution and Revision](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-packages-distribution-and-revision)
title: Delete a Submittal Package
description: How to delete a submittal from the project's Submittals tool.
